query: SELECT * FROM island_guides WHERE atoll = 'Baa Atoll' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT * FROM island_guides WHERE atoll = 'Baa Atoll' LIMIT 1;

rows.name: Godhdhoo
rows.overview: Peaceful local island with access to Hanifaru Bay and excellent diving opportunities
rows.quickFacts: ["Island Type: Local inhabited island","Best For: Snorkelers, divers, budget travelers","Atmosphere: Peaceful local island","House Reef: Excellent snorkeling","Main Language: Dhivehi, English widely spoken","Accommodation: Budget-friendly guesthouses"]
rows.topThingsToDo: [{"emoji":"🤿","title":"Snorkeling & Diving","description":"Excellent reefs with diverse marine life, perfect for all levels"},{"emoji":"🏖️","title":"️ Beach Relaxation","description":"Beautiful beaches, calm lagoon, peaceful island vibes"},{"emoji":"🌅","title":"Sunset Viewing","description":"Spectacular sunsets over the ocean, perfect photography spot"},{"emoji":"🏝️","title":"Island Exploration","description":"Walk around island, visit local shops, experience authentic culture"},{"emoji":"👥","title":"️ Local Dining","description":"Authentic Maldivian cuisine at budget-friendly prices"}]
rows.foodCafes: [{"emoji":"👥","name":"️ Local Restaurants","description":"Traditional Maldivian cuisine and fresh seafood"},{"emoji":"☕","name":"Cafes","description":"Tea, coffee, and snacks"}]
rows.faq: [{"answer": "Yes, excellent reefs with diverse marine life directly from beaches.", "question": "🤿 Is snorkeling good?"}, {"answer": "Peaceful, authentic local island with friendly residents.", "question": "🏖️ What is the island like?"}, {"answer": "Speedboat or ferry from Male, approximately 45 minutes.", "question": "🚤 How do I get here?"}, {"answer": "Budget travelers: $45-75/day. Mid-range: $90-130/day.", "question": "💰 What is the budget?"}, {"answer": "Yes, very safe. Quiet, organized island with friendly locals.", "question": "🌊 Is it safe?"}]
rows.attractions: [{"name":"House Reef","description":"Excellent snorkeling opportunities"},{"name":"Local Island","description":"Authentic Maldivian community"}]
rows.nearbyAirports: [{"code": "MLE", "description": "International flights to Malé, then speedboat to Godhdhoo", "distance": "50-100 km", "duration": "1-2 hours", "name": "Malé International Airport", "transferType": "Speedboat"}]
rows.nearbyDiveSites: [{"name":"Kooddoo Kandu","distance":"12 km","difficulty":"Advanced","description":"A thrilling channel dive known for strong currents and large pelagic encounters, including grey reef sharks, eagle rays, and schooling barracuda. Requires experience."},{"name":"Maareha Thila","distance":"8 km","difficulty":"Intermediate","description":"A vibrant thila (underwater pinnacle) teeming with colorful soft corals, anemones, and a diverse array of reef fish. Often visited by turtles and white-tip reef sharks."},{"name":"Viligili Corner","distance":"15 km","difficulty":"Intermediate","description":"Located at the corner of Viligili island, this site offers a drift dive along a reef wall, famous for its healthy coral gardens and potential sightings of Napoleon wrasse and manta rays during season."},{"name":"Godhdhoo Beyru","distance":"3 km","difficulty":"Beginner","description":"A shallow house reef dive suitable for beginners and night dives. Features gentle currents, abundant macro life, and resident reef sharks."}]
rows.nearbySurfSpots: [{"name":"Tiger Stripes","distance":"18 km","difficulty":"Advanced","description":"A powerful and fast right-hander reef break, known for its long barrels and challenging sections. Best suited for experienced surfers."},{"name":"Beacons","distance":"22 km","difficulty":"Advanced","description":"One of the most famous and consistent right-handers in the Huvadhoo Atoll, offering long, hollow walls and excellent barrel sections. Can get crowded."},{"name":"Blue Bowls","distance":"16 km","difficulty":"Intermediate","description":"A fun and forgiving right-hander that breaks over a coral reef. Offers long, peeling walls perfect for carves and maneuvers. Suitable for intermediate to advanced surfers."}]
